name: BB:CategoryDefinition: IRC Detection Based on Firewall Events
notes: This Building Block identifies IRC traffic that has been identified by events or categories.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: IRC Detection Based on Firewall Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, BB:PortDefinition: IRC Ports
when the event context is Local to Remote, Remote to Local
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: IRC Detection Based on Firewall Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept, BB:PortDefinition: IRC Ports
AND when the event context is Local to Remote, Remote to Local
